headline: Kroger Easter hours 2026: Is Kroger open on Easter Sunday

headline: Is Trader Joe’s open on Easter?
summary: Trader Joe's doesn't sell Easter brunch meal deals the way some other grocers, such as Kroger and Safeway, do, but shoppers can find everything from eggs and honey-baked hams to pastries and all the ingredients you need to make a mimosa. So if you haven't quite finished all your grocery shopping ...

headline: Is Kroger (KR) Pricing Reflect Its DCF Upside And High P/E Multiple?
summary: If you are wondering whether Kroger is priced in line with what you are actually getting, this article walks through what the current share price could be implying about value. With the stock at US$72.35 and returns of 14.9% year to date and 113.0% over 5 years, many investors are asking whether the recent pullback of 1.2% over 7 days and 2.4% over 30 days is a pause or a warning sign.
